# harvester_kubeovn_iptables_fip_rule (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_iptables_fip_rule" "example" {
  name        = "my-fip-rule"
  eip         = harvester_kubeovn_iptables_eip.example.name
  internal_ip = "10.0.0.100"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `eip` (String)
- `internal_ip` (String)
- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `ready` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
- `status_internal_ip` (String)
- `status_nat_gw_dp` (String)
- `status_v4_ip` (String)
- `status_v6_ip` (String)
